scripts.build: npx tsc --noEmit && parcel build index.html && mkdir -p dist/public/ffmpeg && cp -R public/ffmpeg/. dist/public/ffmpeg/
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx serve dist -p 3003 -s
scripts.serve: npm run build && npx http-server dist -p 3004 -o --fallback /index.html
scripts.fresh-build: npm run clear-cache && npm run build
scripts.sync-ffmpeg-assets: mkdir -p public/ffmpeg && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/esm/worker.js node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/esm/const.js node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/esm/errors.js public/ffmpeg/ && curl -L -o public/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.10/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.js && curl -L -o public/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.wasm https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.10/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.wasm
